title: Robert T. Burton
extract: Robert Taylor Burton was a member of the presiding bishopric of the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints from 1874 until his death. He was also one of the principal officers in the Nauvoo Legion during its Utah reconstitution and led the territorial militia against the Morrisites during the 1862 Morrisite War.
extract_html: Robert Taylor Burton was a member of the presiding bishopric of the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints from 1874 until his death. He was also one of the principal officers in the Nauvoo Legion during its Utah reconstitution and led the territorial militia against the Morrisites during the 1862 Morrisite War.
